title: Portfolio Framework
description: Modular React-based portfolio framework using reusable components, JSON-driven content, theme support, and GitHub Pages deployment.
details: A reusable personal portfolio foundation built around React components, JSON content files, theme support, and static deployment.

title: Homelab Infrastructure
description: Designing a self-hosted environment using Proxmox, Linux, Docker, monitoring, and web services.
details: A hands-on infrastructure project focused on virtualization, containerized services, monitoring, and repeatable home server operations.

title: Reddit Stock Tracker
description: Planned analytics platform that tracks ticker mentions, sentiment, and discussion trends from Reddit using Python and PostgreSQL.
details: A planned data application for collecting Reddit discussion signals, tracking ticker mentions, and surfacing stock discussion trends.
